'''Jouffer Talamiin''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Infiltrator (starfighter)|infiltrator]].

Talamiin was the lead pilot of infiltrator unit [[Scandium Team]]. Unfortunately for her, during the [[battle of Gendrah-Narvin]], Talamiin was shot by the enemy and she suffered injuries that left her permanently handicapped. She had to retire from the lead pilot seat, and was replaced by [[Aven Cholus]].

{{Char-stub}}
